enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Qualifying assets of
NBFC-MFIs shall constitute a minimum of 60 percent of the total assets (netted off by
intangible assets), on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: 60 percent of the total assets (netted off by intangible assets), on an ongoing basis

conditions:
If an NBFC-MFI fails to maintain the qualifying
assets as aforesaid for four consecutive quarters
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If an NBFC-MFI fails to maintain the qualifying
assets as aforesaid for four consecutive quarters, it shall approach the Reserve Bank
with a remediation plan for taking a view in the matter.
enriched_requirements.object: with a remediation plan for taking a view in the matter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI acting as Channelizing Agent for Schemes operated by Central /
State Government Agencies shall abide by the following guidelines:
(1) Loans disbursed or managed by the NBFC-MFI in its capacity as channelizing
agent for Central / State Government Agencies shall be considered as a separate
business segment.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines: (1) Loans disbursed or managed by the NBFC-MFI in its capacity as channelizing agent for Central / State Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These loans shall not be included either in the numerator
(microfinance loans) or the denominator (total assets) for the purpose of determining
compliance with the minimum threshold of microfinance loans.
enriched_requirements.object: the numerator (microfinance loans) or the denominator (total assets) for the purpose of determining compliance with the minimum

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An NBFC-MFI may act as Channelizing Agent for distribution of loans under
special schemes of Central / State Government Agencies subject to following conditions:
enriched_requirements.object: for distribution of loans under special schemes of Central / State Government Agencies subject to following conditions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall maintain a capital adequacy ratio consisting of Tier 1 and Tier
2 capital which shall not be less than 15 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of
on-balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on-balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The total of Tier 2 capital at any point of time, shall not exceed 100 percent of Tier
1 capital.
enriched_requirements.object: Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The treatment to on-balance and off-balance sheet assets for capital adequacy
shall be as provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 respectively.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 respectively

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall also adhere to provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025
on treatment of deferred tax assets and deferred tax liabilities for computation of capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 on t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For loans guaranteed under any existing or future schemes launched by CGTMSE,
CRGFTLIH and NCGTC, an NBFC-MFI shall assign risk weight as per the instructions
specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: per the instructions specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)

conditions: where not contradictory to the contents of these directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other provisions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 excluding
paragraphs 6(1), 6(2) and 17, where not contradictory to the contents of these directions,
shall be applicable to NBFC-MFIs.

An NBFC-MFI shall adopt the following norms for its microfinance loans:
B.1 Asset Classification Norms
23.
enriched_requirements.object: for its microfinance loans: B

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Standard asset means the asset in respect of which, no default in repayment of
principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem
nor carry more than normal risk attached to the business.
enriched_requirements.object: of which, no default in repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem nor ca

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Non-performing asset means an asset for which, interest / principal payment has
remained overdue for a period of more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: interest / principal payment has remained overdue for a period of more than 90 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For non-performing assets related to microfinance loans of NBFC-MFIs,
provisioning norms shall be as below:
(1) The aggregate loan provision to be maintained by NBFC-MFIs at any point of time
shall not be less than the higher of
enriched_requirements.object: higher of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amount outstanding in excess of the guaranteed
portion shall be provided for as per provisioning norms as mentioned in Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: per provisioning norms as mentioned in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classific

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Standard assets provisioning of microfinance loans of an NBFC-MFI lying in a
particular layer of the scale based regulatory framework shall be in accordance with
instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025 for the
respective layer.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and

conditions: where not contradictory to the contents of these directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other provisions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025, where not contradictory to the contents of these directions, shall be applicable to
NBFC-MFIs.

An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment
Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025
excluding paragraphs 6(3) and 6(4).
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025 excludi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI may make use of the 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk
Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the following directions on credit facilities and
various financial services:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: directions on credit facilities and various financial services: (1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - C

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall ensure adherence to the following directions:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible
Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: following directions: (1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 10, 11, 13,
14 and 15 of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Branch
Authorisation) Directions, 2025 on opening of branch / representative office abroad and
closure of branches.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in paragraphs 10, 11, 13, 14 and 15 of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Branch Authoris

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions contained in paragraphs 15 to 19 of
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial
Services) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in paragraphs 15 to 19 of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Ser

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall adhere to the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Voluntary Amalgamation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Voluntary Amalgamation) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC-MFI shall become member of at least one Self-Regulatory Organization
(SRO) for NBFC-MFIs which is recognized by the Reserve Bank and shall also comply
with the Code of Conduct prescribed by the SRO.
enriched_requirements.object: least one Self-Regulatory Organization (SRO) for NBFC-MFIs which is recognized by the Reserve Bank and shall also comply with the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the SRO holding recognition from the Reserve Bank shall have to adhere
to the following set of functions and responsibilities which may be modified by the Reserve
Bank from time to time to improve the efficiency of the sector:
(1) Criteria for Recognition of SRO for NBFC-MFIs
enriched_requirements.object: the following set of functions and responsibilities which may be modified by the Reserve Bank from time to time to improve the effic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The SRO shall have at least 1/3rd of the NBFC-MFIs registered as its members, at
the time of recognition.
enriched_requirements.object: of the NBFC-MFIs registered as its members, at the time of recognition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) It shall have adequate capital to be able to discharge its functions without being
overly dependent on subscription from members.
enriched_requirements.object: be able to discharge its functions without being overly dependent on subscription from members

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The memorandum / bye laws of the SRO shall specify criteria for admission of
members and the functions it shall discharge, as one of its main objects.
enriched_requirements.object: of members and the functions it shall discharge, as one of its main objects

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The memorandum / bye laws of an SRO shall provide for the manner in which the
Governing Body / Board of Directors of the SRO would function.
enriched_requirements.object: in which the Governing Body / Board of Directors of the SRO would function

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) The Board shall have adequate representation from both large and small NBFC-
MFIs.
enriched_requirements.object: both large and small NBFC- MFIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) 1/3rd of the Board of Directors shall be independent and not associated with
member institutions.
enriched_requirements.object: associated with member institutions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) The Board of Directors and individuals comprising the management shall be
considered 'Fit and Proper', by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Proper', by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (viii) It shall have adequate internal controls in place.
enriched_requirements.object: in place

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) The SRO shall function in the interest of all the stakeholders and not seen to be
only an industry body.
enriched_requirements.object: of all the stakeholders and not seen to be only an industry body

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (x) The SRO shall frame a Code of Conduct to be followed by its members.
enriched_requirements.object: Conduct to be followed by its members

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xi) It shall have a Grievance Redressal Mechanism and a Dispute Resolution
Mechanism in place, including a specially appointed Grievance Redressal Nodal Officer.
enriched_requirements.object: Mechanism and a Dispute Resolution Mechanism in place, including a specially appointed Grievance Redressal Nodal Officer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xii) It shall be in a position to exercise surveillance over its members to ensure
compliance with the Code of Conduct and regulatory prescriptions of the Reserve Bank
through an Enforcement Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: to exercise surveillance over its members to ensure compliance with the Code of Conduct and regulatory prescriptions of the Reserve B

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xiii) It shall also have a developmental function of training and awareness programmes
for its members, for the Self-Help Groups and conduct research and development for the
growth of the MFI sector.
enriched_requirements.object: function of training and awareness programmes for its members, for the Self-Help Groups and conduct research and development

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The SRO, once recognized, shall nominate a Compliance Officer who shall directly
report to the Reserve Bank and who shall keep the Reserve Bank regularly posted of all
developments in the sector.
enriched_requirements.object: who shall directly report to the Reserve Bank and who shall keep the Reserve Bank regularly posted of all developments i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (ii) The SRO shall submit its Annual Report to the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: to the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) It shall conduct investigation into areas of concern as pointed out by the Reserve
Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: of concern as pointed out by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The SRO shall inform the Reserve Bank of the violations of the provisions of the
RBI Act, 1934, the directions, the circulars or the guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank
from time to time, by any of its members.
enriched_requirements.object: of the violations of the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934, the directions, the circulars or the guidelines issued by the Reserv

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) It shall provide information, including data, to the Reserve Bank periodically or as
requested for by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: to the Reserve Bank periodically or as requested for by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The industry associations / SROs shall also play a key
role in ensuring compliance with the regulatory framework.
enriched_requirements.object: role in ensuring compliance with the regulatory framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition, banks lending to
NBFC-MFIs shall also ensure that systems, practices and lending policies in NBFC-MFIs
are aligned to the regulatory framework.
enriched_requirements.object: practices and lending policies in NBFC-MFIs are aligned to the regulatory framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Microfinance loans of all NBFCs including NBFC-MFIs shall be guided by the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025, Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible Business
Conduct) Directions, 2025, and Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time
to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Fina

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC, which does not qualify as an NBFC-MFI shall extend microfinance
loans, which in aggregate does not exceed 25 per cent of its total assets.
enriched_requirements.object: in aggregate does not exceed 25 per cent of its total assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
enriched_requirements.object: affect:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
<image>
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
